Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Yes, ten years ago...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}On the night when I was born,[n]I stood on this very bridge...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My sole purpose is to destroy Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That is the reason why I was given[n]both a sense of self and a Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I... am the bearer of the 13th Arcana.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everyone knew me as "Death."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But when I came into being, a part of my[n]power was broken off and scattered...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wasn't at my full strength[n]back then... I was incomplete.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Even so, your power was still far too great.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I was unable to defeat you,[n]my only option was to seal you away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}However, under the circumstances,[n]there was only one suitable vessel...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A human boy who had the[n]misfortune of being nearby.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had no other choice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now I see... I was inside of him all this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And I unwittingly led him to discover[n]my twelve missing pieces...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I get it. I understand now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember everything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I know exactly who... and what... I am.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Palladion![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Don't be foolish, Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can't win. I'm even stronger than before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A machine is created to serve a specific purpose.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I will destroy you... That is[n]my only reason for existing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't have to be that way, Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't... carry out my mission...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm a machine that can't fulfill its purpose...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have no reason... to exist...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm sorry, everyone...[n]{f 1 1}
